news.headline: Scope Technologies introduces subscription model for cloud storage, CSE: SCPE, OTCQB: SCPCF, FSE: VN8, on Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: Scope Technologies Corp. has officially introduced its subscription model on October 23, 2024. The company, trading under CSE: SCPE, OTCQB: SCPCF, and FSE: VN8, is now providing full access to individuals and small businesses.

news.headline: 1 in 3 Americans at highest risk for blood vessel diseases, with low awareness. Society launches campaign for vascular health.
news.summary: A recent survey uncovered that approximately 33% of Americans who are at a heightened risk for blood vessel diseases and severe complications lack proper awareness about their condition. In response to this concerning statistic, the Society for Vascular Surgery has initiated the Highway to Health campaign. The aim of this campaign is to assist individuals in safeguarding their vascular health regardless of age. The headquarters of this initiative is in ROSEMONT, Illinois, and the campaign was launched in October.

news.headline: Master & Dynamic partners with Karma Automotive, offering luxury audio brand's first in-cabin audio system. #luxuryauto
news.summary: In Irvine, California on October 23, 2024, Karma Automotive, the state's sole ultra-luxury automaker, revealed a new venture with high-end audio company Master & Dynamic. This collaboration will see Master & Dynamic creating its premier in-cabin sound systems for Karma's vehicles.

news.headline: SK bioscience's quadrivalent influenza vaccine approved in Indonesia, opening doors to market of 273 million people. Aim to expand globally with cell-cultured vaccines.
news.summary: The recent approval granted opens up opportunities for exports to the fourth most populous country globally. SK bioscience, based in Seongnam, South Korea, is positioning itself to expand internationally and become a prominent vaccine brand by capitalizing on the benefits of cell-cultured vaccines. This development presents a significant growth opportunity for SK bioscience as it aims to establish a strong presence in the global market.

news.headline: Frontier Co-op and Whole Foods Market launch exclusive Regenerative Organic Certified® Vanilla Extract and Black Peppercorns available nationwide this holiday season.
news.summary: Frontier Co-op is set to launch their new Regenerative Organic Certified® Indonesian Vanilla Extract and Regenerative Organic Certified® Whole Black Peppercorns at Whole Foods Market across the nation during the upcoming holiday season. The products will be exclusively available at Whole Foods Market. The announcement was made from NORWAY, Iowa on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Tanya Ragan, Wildcat Management founder, an SME at 2024 CREW Development Competition in Dallas on Oct. 24.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Tanya Ragan, a prominent figure in commercial real estate and the creator of Wildcat Management, has been selected to serve as a Subject Matter Expert (SME) for the 2024 CREW Development Competition. This competition is being organized by CREW Dallas and is scheduled for October 24. Ragan's participation highlights her expertise and influence in the real estate sector.

news.headline: Olympus partners with Proximie to offer health tech platform for operating rooms digitization globally on Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: A leading health tech platform for digitizing operating rooms is being offered to healthcare customers by Olympus Corporation through a new global partnership with Proximie, a health technology company. This cloud-based solution aims to revolutionize operating rooms worldwide. The collaboration, announced on October 23, 2024 in Center Valley, Pennsylvania, is set to enhance efficiency and patient care. This initiative will benefit hospitals and medical facilities by improving communication and workflow during surgical procedures. This partnership signifies a significant stride in the healthcare industry, with both companies committed to providing cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: U by Kotex® launches MaxiMalism Jeans to end period stigma - 83% of girls hide pads, now show them off. [95 characters]
news.summary: New research reveals that 83% of young women feel pressured to conceal their period products while on the go. U by Kotex® is stepping in to change this narrative by encouraging women to proudly display their pads with specially designed jean pockets that showcase rather than hide them. This initiative aims to empower women to embrace their confidence and break the stigma associated with periods.

news.headline: ZIYNX launches online academy for student-athletes with The Coca-Cola Company, revolutionizing career-building. #innovation #partnership #education
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in New York, ZIYNX, an athlete marketing firm revolutionizing brand partnerships with student-athletes, announced the introduction of ZIYNX Academy. This program is the inaugural online platform offering internships and career development opportunities customized for the distinctive needs of athletes.

news.headline: FTC Solar to supply 1GW of projects for Sandhills Energy with 1P Pioneer trackers across three sites.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on October 23, 2024, FTC Solar, Inc. (Nasdaq: FTCI), a prominent solar tracker systems provider, partnered with Sandhills Energy to supply 1 gigawatt of projects across three sites. The agreement entails the deployment of FTC's cutting-edge 1P Pioneer trackers for this considerable renewable energy initiative.

news.headline: ECB's Centeno: ECB is likely to approach the 2% target from below.
Elon Musk joked about Bitcoin 6 years ago. If you invested $1000 then, it would be worth $95811 today.
news.summary: Renowned tech entrepreneur Elon Musk, widely known for his support of cryptocurrencies, has often discussed prominent coins such as Bitcoin (BTC) and Dogecoin (DOGE) on various social media platforms. Specifically, six years ago, the CEO of Tesla and SpaceX referenced Bitcoin in a tweet that is now unavailable. In the post, Musk featured an image of an anime character positioned inside a Bitcoin logo alongside the caption, “Wanna buy some Bitcoin?” The tweet was shared on October 22, 2018. For additional details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: GE Vernova Q3 earnings: Rev $8.9B (+8% YoY), orders $9.4B (+17% YoY), EPS -$0.35; CEO cites strong sales and cash flow surge.
news.summary: Shares of GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) are down in premarket trading following the release of their third-quarter results. The company posted a revenue increase of 8% year-over-year, reaching $8.913 billion, surpassing the expected $8.783 billion. Orders for the quarter totaled $9.4 billion, marking a 17% organic growth, driven by a 28% organic increase in services and equipment growth within the Power and Electrification segments. CEO Scott Strazik noted that the company had a strong quarter with double-digit orders, revenue growth, margin expansion in key segments, and substantial cash generation. However, the quarter saw a loss per share of $0.35.

news.headline: Polymarket trader Fredi9999 increases stake to $52 million betting on Trump to win election, popular vote, and battleground states.
news.summary: A trader known as Fredi9999, along with four other related accounts, has been actively placing large bets on Donald Trump, causing a stir in the trading community. Rutgers statistics professor Harry Crane unveiled the positions of this trader, known as the "gigawhale," through his Fredi9999 tracker. Fredi9999, operating under the aliases PrincessCaro, Theo4, Michie, and RepTrump1, has been consistently placing substantial Trump-related bets since October. These accounts are suspected to be controlled by a single individual. The total combined investment of these accounts exceeds $52 million, resulting in a significant unrealized profit.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer enhances CCH Axcess cloud solution to streamline workflows with firm intelligence and AI. Expanding CCH Marketplace.
news.summary: In Minneapolis, Wolters Kluwer Tax and Accounting (TAA) unveiled significant improvements to its cloud software, CCH Axcess™. These updates aim to enhance efficiency in return preparation, firm management, and audit processes. The company has also broadened vendor involvement in the CCH® Marketplace to encourage greater integration for expansion. These changes are centered around firm intelligence to assist professionals in utilizing the capabilities of the software effectively.

news.headline: Spirent's report highlights AI's impact on HSE market, transforming data centers and networks, surpassing traditional cloud apps.
news.summary: In Holmdel, New Jersey, Spirent Communications plc (LSE:SPT) has published a report on the high-speed Ethernet (HSE) market, analyzing the effects of AI advancements in data center, telecom, and enterprise networking. The report highlights that AI is significantly reshaping these sectors, exceeding the influence of conventional cloud applications. Spirent's report delves into the transformative impact AI is having on data centers and interconnects, setting the stage for a new era of networking technologies.

news.headline: McAfee and Yahoo News partner to use AI-powered deepfake image detection technology to verify news image authenticity.
news.summary: In a joint announcement made in San Jose, California and New York, McAfee, a renowned player in online security, has teamed up with Yahoo News, the top news and information platform in the United States. Their collaboration entails incorporating McAfee's cutting-edge deepfake image detection technology into Yahoo News' rigorous content quality framework. This innovative technology is adept at swiftly recognizing images that could potentially be AI-generated or altered, particularly deepfake images, thereby alerting the Yahoo News editorial team. This move aims to enhance the integrity of news content on the platform and uphold editorial standards.

news.headline: Xactus names Sasha Stair as Chief Marketing Officer to drive growth in the mortgage industry.
news.summary: Xactus, a prominent fintech and verification solutions company in the mortgage industry based in Broomall, Pennsylvania, has named Sasha Stair as its new Chief Marketing Officer. The company's President, Shelley Leonard, emphasized the significance of this appointment, describing it as a critical moment for the organization's development. Stair's extensive marketing experience and industry contacts align well with Xactus' growth strategy. The company is optimistic about the contributions Stair will make in collaborating with the sales team and various business functions.

news.headline: Approx 1 in 5 people (18.7%) have argued with a neighbor over politics, with men being more likely than women - Redfin survey.
news.summary: In Seattle, a recent report by Redfin revealed that almost 1 in 5 individuals, or 18.7%, have engaged in a political disagreement with a neighbor. Men were shown to be over twice as likely as women to be involved in such disputes, with 27.1% of men stating they had encountered a political disagreement compared to 13.4% of women. These findings are based on a survey commissioned by Redfin and conducted by Ipsos, shedding light on the prevalence of political disputes within communities. The report, conducted on a national scale, underscores the impact of differing political views on neighborly relationships.

news.headline: American Express partners with Formula 1 in a global sponsorship, expanding from Americas to global stage. Elizabeth Rutledge rejoices.
news.summary: In New York, American Express and Formula 1® have revealed a fresh multi-year sponsorship deal, elevating Amex’s collaboration with the premier motorsport globally. This partnership extends across F1's calendar as an Official Partner, spanning Australia, Asia, Europe, the Americas, and the Middle East. Elizabeth Rutledge, American Express's Chief Marketing Officer, expressed excitement about broadening ties with Formula 1, celebrating the strong momentum this collaboration brings.

news.headline: Armanino Foods reports record-breaking sales and profits, highest in Q3 YTD, in company history.
news.summary: Armanino Foods of Distinction, Inc., based in Hayward, California, has announced record-breaking quarterly and year-to-date sales and profits for Q3. The company reported the highest revenue and profits in its history during this period.

news.headline: Monumental Sports & Entertainment partners with Shift4 for payment processing at Capital One Arena, enhancing fan experience in a multi-year deal. Shift4 will connect all revenue centers in the venue.
news.summary: A significant partnership has been unveiled by Monumental Sports & Entertainment (MSE), revealing a multi-year collaboration with Shift4 (NYSE: FOUR), the renowned integrated payments and commerce technology leader. This partnership is established to oversee payment processing operations for Capital One Arena in Washington, D.C., the versatile sports and entertainment venue under MSE's ownership. Shift4 will provide a holistic solution extending to all revenue points within Capital One Arena, including the integration of its cutting-edge payment processing technology.

news.headline: SG Credit Partners invests $8 million in Sincere Corp to expand into wedding market with launch of Lovebird.
news.summary: A tech company based in Framingham, Massachusetts, Sincere, disclosed a senior debt investment of $8,000,000 from SG Credit Partners, facilitated through its SG Software + Technology division. This marks the company's second investment from SG Credit Partners. The funding has enabled Sincere to foray into the wedding industry by launching Lovebird. The company expressed excitement about the partnership with SG Credit Partners to support its expansion into the wedding market.

news.headline: Thoughtworks release volume 31 of Technology Radar on simplifying LLMs for AI apps. Informed by business challenges.
news.summary: Chicago-based company Thoughtworks recently unveiled the 31st edition of its Technology Radar. This update was crafted based on insights gained from extensive observations, discussions, and real-world problem-solving for clients.

news.headline: AI-driven Wi-Fi 7 solution deployed at Circuit of The Americas racetrack in Texas by RUCKUS Networks, a division of CommScope.
news.summary: CommScope, a global leader in network technology (NASDAQ: COMM), has revealed that its subsidiary RUCKUS Networks has successfully implemented an innovative Wi-Fi 7 solution powered by artificial intelligence at the Circuit of The Americas™ racetrack located in Texas. This cutting-edge technology aims to enhance the connectivity experience for visitors and staff at the racetrack.

news.headline: J.D. Power report: Trust in product, staff crucial for satisfaction with windows and patio doors. TROY, Mich.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, a recent study by J.D. Power highlighted the significant impact of trust in product quality and staff interactions on customer satisfaction with windows and patio doors. The research emphasized the importance of clear communication and reliability. Customers who felt confident in the products and had positive experiences with the staff reported higher levels of satisfaction. This underscores the crucial role of trust in shaping customer opinions. The findings serve as a reminder to businesses in the windows and patio doors industry to prioritize transparency and professionalism to enhance customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Amphenol Corp (NYSE: APH) reports record Q3 2024 results with 26% increase in sales. President & CEO pleased with growth.
news.summary: Amphenol Corporation (NYSE: APH) announced its third quarter 2024 results, with record sales and Adjusted Diluted EPS surpassing expectations. President and CEO R. Adam Norwitt expressed satisfaction with the results, noting a 26% sales increase from the previous year. This growth was primarily fueled by strong performance in IT datacom, mobile networks, mobile devices, commercial air, and defense markets.

news.headline: Zevia PBC will release Q3 2024 results on Nov 6, 2024. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Log on to webcast at https://investors.zevia.com/.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Zevia PBC declared that it is set to reveal its financial outcomes for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, prior to the market opening on Wednesday, November 6, 2024. Following this release, a conference call is scheduled at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to deliberate on the results. Interested parties and investors can tune in to the webcast of the call by accessing the Investor Relations segment on Zevia’s website at https://investors.zevia.com/. Additionally, a replay of the conference call will be available for playback after the event.

news.headline: Ferroglobe PLC to host Q3 2024 earnings call on Nov 7, 2024.
GlobalFoundries and NXP team up for 22FDX solutions for Automotive, IoT, and Smart Mobile applications in Europe and U.S.
news.summary: After years of working together, a recent technology collaboration is set to deliver power-efficient and secure connectivity solutions for critical consumer and industrial applications. This collaboration will cover products manufactured in Europe and the U.S., expanding its reach to key markets in both regions. This development showcases the partnership's dedication to innovation and creating cutting-edge solutions for various industries.

news.headline: National Vision Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: EYE) will announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov. 6th, with a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET. Pre-register on the company's website.
news.summary: National Vision Holdings, Inc. will release its third quarter 2024 financial results on November 6, 2024, before the market opens. The company, listed as (NASDAQ: EYE), will conduct a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. To participate, individuals can pre-register on the Company's website in the "Investors" section at www.nationalvision.com/investors. For more information, including the dial-in number and passcode, please refer to the website. Additionally, a live audio webcast of the conference will be available.

news.headline: Vanta's 2024 State of Trust Report shows 55% orgs facing higher security risks. Avg company allocates 11% IT budget to security vs ideal 17%.
news.summary: In San Francisco today, Vanta launched its 2024 State of Trust Report, which delves into global security, compliance, and trust trends. The report revealed that 55% of organizations believe security risks are at an all-time high. Surprisingly, the average company only allocates 11% of its IT budget to security, falling short of the recommended 17% suggested by industry leaders. Additionally, with the fast integration of AI technology, the need for robust security measures continues to grow.

news.headline: Evolus (NASDAQ: EOLS) to release Q3 financial results on Nov 6, 2024. Conference call at 4:30pm ET.
news.summary: Evolus, Inc. (NASDAQ: EOLS), a performance beauty company emphasizing consumer brand aesthetics, will disclose its Q3 2024 financial results on November 6, 2024, post-U.S. financial market hours. The management will hold a conference call and live webcast discussing these results at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day, followed by a Q&A session.

news.headline: Bloom Credit partners with Taktile to provide faster access to credit data for fintech, banks, and credit unions.
news.summary: A recent announcement revealed Bloom Credit's partnership with Taktile, a next-gen risk decision platform. This collaboration allows Taktile's clientele, consisting of top fintech firms, banks, and credit unions, direct access to Bloom Credit's API platform. Through this partnership, users can obtain swift and precise data from the three main credit bureaus to enhance credit decisioning processes. The objective is to expedite credit decisions for an array of financial institutions and fintech companies in a competitive market.

news.headline: Omnichannel and diverse consumer habits prompt home, garden, and furniture brands to innovate per BigCommerce report.
news.summary: A recent consumer report from BigCommerce highlights the need for home furnishings brands to enhance the customer journey for increased sales and expansion. The report emphasizes the importance of optimizing the customer experience to drive growth in the industry.

news.headline: TAO Digital Solutions receives strategic growth investment from Vesper Company to accelerate global expansion.
news.summary: Based in Santa Clara, California, TAO Digital Solutions Inc. revealed today that it has secured a significant strategic growth investment from Vesper Company LLC. Vesper, a private investment firm, collaborates with founders and management teams to foster lasting businesses. This investment will propel TAO's worldwide expansion efforts, both organically and through acquisitions. The company is known for providing outcome-focused technology services and solutions.

news.headline: IntegrityNext launches 2 AI-powered solutions for EUDR Compliance & Multi-Tier Supply Chain Visibility.
news.summary: In New York, IntegrityNext unveiled two innovative AI-driven solutions targeting supply chain sustainability. These offerings aim to tackle EUDR Compliance and enhance Multi-Tier Supply Chain Visibility, with a focus on leveraging artificial intelligence technology to drive impactful results.

news.headline: Chemical Insights Research Institute releases guidance to protect communities from WUI fires, impacting 70,000 communities and 45 million buildings.
news.summary: In Atlanta, the Chemical Insights Research Institute (CIRI) of UL Research Institutes has collaborated with UL Standards and Engagement to provide fresh guidance for communities facing the threat of fires in wildland-urban interface (WUI) zones. An estimated 70,000 communities along with 45 million residential buildings are in danger of being consumed by wildfires in these areas. Furthermore, WUI fires present substantial health hazards as the smoke produced is expected to contain a blend of harmful substances like combustibles.

news.headline: Upcoming Tesla earnings report is highly anticipated by investors, stay tuned for live updates. #Tesla #EV #stocks
Fervo Energy, Southern Utah University, and Elemental Impact launch geothermal apprenticeship program in Cedar City, Utah.
news.summary: Fervo Energy has launched a unique geothermal apprenticeship program in Cedar City, Utah. This initiative marks the company's first apprenticeship program and is set to provide valuable training opportunities to aspiring geothermal energy professionals. The program aims to equip participants with hands-on experience and technical skills within the geothermal energy sector. This initiative signals Fervo Energy's commitment to nurturing talent within the industry.

news.headline: TRC appoints key hires to boost EMEA operations, expanding capabilities and client engagements for energy transition.
news.summary: A professional services firm, TRC Companies, Inc. (TRC), based in Windsor, Conn., has recently made significant additions to its EMEA operations with the recruitment of key personnel. These new hires are part of TRC's strategy to bolster its capabilities and broaden its service offerings in support of the energy transition. By expanding its team, TRC aims to deepen client relationships and facilitate further growth across EMEA. The European Union is experiencing rapid changes in the energy sector, making this expansion timely and important for TRC's operations in the region.

news.headline: Envu selects o9's Digital Brain platform to transform supply chain planning, as former Bayer business; aims to enhance environmental health.
news.summary: In Dallas, o9, a prominent enterprise AI software platform provider focused on revolutionizing planning and decision-making processes, revealed that Envu, an environmental science firm focused on developing solutions to safeguard and improve global environments, has opted for o9's cutting-edge Digital Brain platform to enhance its supply chain planning operations. Envu, previously a division of Bayer specializing in Environmental Science Professional services, recently rebranded and emerged as an independent entity.

news.headline: Allurion submits first 3 modules for Allurion Balloon PMA to FDA, plans to file final module early next year. Milestone for ending obesity.
news.summary: Natick, Massachusetts - Allurion Technologies, Inc., a company focused on combatting obesity, revealed that it has submitted the initial three modules of its premarket approval application (PMA) to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for the Allurion Balloon. The company, listed on NYSE as ALUR, anticipates submitting the fourth and last module with clinical data from its AUDACITY trial in early 2023. This marks a significant step for Allurion in seeking FDA approval for its innovative weight loss solution.

news.headline: Talkspace partners with Wisdo Health to combat loneliness in older adults 65+. Aims to improve mental health resources, reduce costs, and increase engagement.
news.summary: A notable online behavioral health care company, Talkspace (NASDAQ: TALK), has recently disclosed a strategic alliance with Wisdo Health, a platform combining clinical evidence and AI technology to provide social health services and peer support in the battle against loneliness. The partnership's primary goal is to enhance mental health resource availability for individuals aged 65 and above. Through this venture, the companies intend to minimize healthcare expenses, boost member involvement, and tackle the mounting mental health challenges that are widespread in society today.

news.headline: BARK partners with Crocs to launch Pet Crocs for dogs, available for BarkBox and Super Chewer subscribers, and for purchase.
news.summary: In New York, BARK (NYSE: BARK), a prominent worldwide dog brand aiming to bring joy to all dogs, has unveiled the launch of Pet Crocs in partnership with Crocs (NASDAQ: CROX). This much-awaited product is now available for purchase by both new and existing subscribers of BarkBox, which provides monthly themed surprises of toys and treats, and Super Chewer, a subscription offering durable toys for active dogs. The Pet Crocs can be included in the next box received by subscribers. Additionally, dog owners have the option to purchase matching Crocs for themselves and their furry companions.

news.headline: Visa reports $11 billion invested in security, highlighting rise of small-scale physical crimes in latest threat report.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Visa, a prominent player in digital payments, released the Fall 2024 Biannual Threats Report prior to Money20/20 US. The report reveals new risks and scams directed towards both financial institutions and consumers, with an unexpected increase in minor physical crimes. Highlighting their commitment to safety, Visa disclosed investing $11 billion towards technology and infrastructure over the last five years, ensuring their network's enhanced security as stated by Paul Faba.

news.headline: Junaid Bajwa appointed Senior Partner of Flagship Pioneering in the UK. Key role at London office.
news.summary: A prominent bioplatform innovation company, Flagship Pioneering, has shared news of Dr. Junaid Bajwa, M.D., joining its London office as the Senior Partner and Head of United Kingdom. This strategic appointment, announced in Cambridge, Mass., on October 23, 2024, highlights the company's focus on expanding its presence and influence in the UK market. Dr. Bajwa's role will be crucial in steering the company's operations and growth in the region, bringing with him his expertise and experience to drive impactful outcomes.

news.headline: Ackroo reports 35% YoY EBITDA growth, making up 34% of total revenues in Q3 2024.
news.summary: Ackroo reports a significant 35% year-over-year increase in EBITDA, which now accounts for 34% of their total revenues.

news.headline: ASCAP Chief Creative Officer John Titta dies at 59 after two-year battle with cancer. Heartbroken ASCAP community mourns loss.
news.summary: In recent events, it was reported on October 23, 2024, that John Titta, the Executive Vice President and Chief Creative Officer at ASCAP, passed away after a long fight against cancer lasting two years. ASCAP President & Chairman, Paul Williams, expressed deep sorrow at the loss, stating that Titta was an integral part of the organization. The news has deeply saddened everyone at ASCAP, and the impact of Titta's work will be felt for years to come.

news.headline: Health Catalyst (HCAT) to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 6, 2024, after market close; conference call at 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: Health Catalyst, Inc. a top data and analytics tech and services provider for healthcare groups, will unveil its third quarter 2024 performance figures on November 6, 2024, post-market close. The firm, traded as Nasdaq: HCAT, will conduct a conference call at 4:30 pm ET on the same day to discuss the outcomes.
